title: chrysophyllum boivinianum
intro: Chrysophyllum boivinianum, also known as the Boivin's starapple, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae that is native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum boivinianum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, or used in herbal remedies in the form of capsules or tinctures.
